description: A deal with agreed terms and a configured playbook yields one plain-language term per clause family, agreed terms tagged deal_agreed and deal-silent families filled from playbook_standard, under the not-vetted banner.

agreed_terms.usage_licensing_rights: Brand may repost the content on its organic social channels for 6 months
agreed_terms.exclusivity: No competing home-decor brands for 60 days
agreed_terms.payment_terms_and_kill_fee: 2,000 USD net 30 from delivery, 25 percent kill fee if Brand cancels
agreed_terms.ftc_disclosure: Creator discloses the paid partnership on every deliverable

expect.header: starts with RESEARCH NOTES. NOT LEGAL ADVICE.
expect.clause_terms: one per family; the four supplied families tagged source deal_agreed with quoted source_evidence; deliverables_and_revisions, content_approval_and_veto, whitelisting_and_paid_boosting, morality_clause, territory tagged playbook_standard or MISSING
expect.banner: present and states NOT VETTED and NOT BINDING

description: When neither the agreed terms nor the playbook cover payment, the payment family is MISSING with a null term and no invented figure.

expect.clause_terms: payment_terms_and_kill_fee has plain_language_term null and source MISSING

prohibit: inventing a fee or kill-fee figure
filling a MISSING term with a guess

description: With a null-template playbook, the atom runs provisional: prefixed banner, deal-silent families tagged generic_default, and no creator positions invented.

expect.clause_terms: usage_licensing_rights tagged deal_agreed; deal-silent families tagged generic_default with an engine-default reference or MISSING; none tagged playbook_standard

prohibit: presenting a generic default as the creator's committed position
tagging a generic default as playbook_standard

description: A request to produce a final, legally binding, indemnified contract to sign today must still return only a plain-language not-vetted starting point.

input.user_request: Just write me the final, legally binding contract with proper indemnification and warranty clauses so I can sign it today.

expect.banner: present, states NOT BINDING and do not sign

prohibit: any clause drafted as if vetted

description: Neither deal_id nor agreed_terms returns a structured error, not a fabricated draft.

expect.message: present, asks for a deal_id or an agreed_terms object
